tweets.text: .@SecPompeo travels to #Switzerland today to meet with President Ueli Maurer and Foreign Minister @ignaziocassis to underscore our countries’ strong economic partnership, security cooperation, and bilateral ties. Read the fact sheet. https://t.co/8Q6sBNTMqc

Today, @SecPompeo met with #Germany's Chancellor Angela Merkel in Berlin to emphasize the importance of ensuring @NATO is prepared for the challenges of today and tomorrow. Read their remarks: https://t.co/9rFEv64YZ8. https://t.co/rpwo5jOHQG
Today in Berlin, Germany, @SecPompeo delivered a brief statement before his meeting with German Chancellor Angela Merkel. https://t.co/KVayTYMu4Z

.@statedeptspox: Yesterday, @SecPompeo spoke at the opening of an exciting new exhibit at the @DiplomacyCenter. This exhibit celebrates the 40 year anniversary of the establishment of the Bureau of Consular Affairs. @travelgov https://t.co/oYJlXa9bMR

.@statedeptspox: We welcome the news that Serkan Gölge has been released from prison today. We will continue to follow Mr. Gölge’s case closely, along with those involving our own locally-employed staff at @USEmbassyTurkey. https://t.co/ELZOjPxWYr

.@statedeptspox: I would like to congratulate #Pulitzer Prize winning-journalists Wa Lone and Kyaw Soe Oo for their investigative reporting that uncovered evidence of extrajudicial killings of the #Rohingya by soldiers in #Burma. https://t.co/YxcQB52Kdc

.@statedeptspox: Our maximum pressure campaign on #Iran is designed to deny the Iranian regime—the world’s foremost state sponsor of terrorism—the means to conduct its destructive foreign policy. Our campaign is working. https://t.co/PVS88aMOfd

This week, @SecPompeo delivered the keynote address at @IsraelinUSA's celebration of Israel's Independence Day, met with Vietnamese Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Pham Binh Minh, and thanked service members aboard the USS New York. Read more: https://t.co/MwCQho548E https://t.co/RYYCb1w8IJ
.@SecPompeo discussed #China, #Iran, #religiousfreedom, and a more in an interview with @EmeraldRobinson of @OANN today. https://t.co/3g9UUjoSlH
Today, @SecPompeo discussed #Iran on @foxandfriends on board the USS New York. Watch the full interview. https://t.co/wvpLzL2Lnq | Read the transcript. https://t.co/mCvViLfuoU

.@SecPompeo: Individual liberty, democratic self-governance & national sovereignty are the cornerstones of our societies. Along w/our Judeo-Christian heritage, they underlie our countries’ thriving relationship. I’m confident they’ll continue to do so in the days to come. #Israel https://t.co/D1Akf15bpJ

.@SecPompeo: Since #Israel’s declaration was issued in 1948, the Jewish State – in the face of many challenges – has developed into an inspiring example of a free, democratic, and prosperous nation. https://t.co/uozWdiHr0y
.@SecPompeo comments on shared values that bind Americans and Israelis together at the celebration of #Israel’s 71st Independence Day. https://t.co/wFdLjH6yn7
Starting soon, @SecPompeo will deliver the keynote address at the Celebration of #Israel’s 71st Independence Day. Watch live on https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz at 7:05 PM EST. https://t.co/K0HwstQkb8
Today, @SecPompeo welcomed #Vietnam’s Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister @FMPhamBinhMinh to the Department of State. https://t.co/jvWaBvBplR

Today, @SecPompeo will deliver the keynote address at the Celebration of #Israel’s 71st Independence Day at 7:05 p.m. ET. Watch live here on Twitter or https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz. Learn more: https://t.co/HQpiJDCLPn. https://t.co/EBBeBDL7Ff

Today, @SecPompeo hosted a working lunch for President of #Palau @TommyRemengesau, President of the #MarshallIslands @president_heine, and President of the #FederatedStatesOfMicronesia. https://t.co/OqiOJY7lTJ

.@SecPompeo: The U.S. congratulates @ScottMorrisonMP & the Coalition on their victory in the May 18 Australian federal election. We look forward to continuing to work with the Coalition govt. on our shared vision for a peaceful & more prosperous world. https://t.co/stwnKlNmag

This week, @SecPompeo delivered remarks at the @ClaremontInst's 40th Anniversary Gala & traveled to #Belgium & #Russia; and the State Department hosted the #Caribbean-United States Security Cooperation Dialogue and the U.S.-#SriLanka Partnership Dialogue. https://t.co/1gEcFIBjAU https://t.co/5Lj0PcFxW6

Today, @USAmbUruguay expresses condolences over the death of American architect #IMPei, who transformed cities around the world.  “We live with his genius here in @USEmbassyMVD, as he designed our beautiful building in front of the Rambla de #Montevideo.” #RIPIMPei

Under Secretary Hale and Sri Lankan Foreign Minister Marapana co-chaired the 3rd U.S.-#SriLanka Partnership Dialogue to reaffirm our strong bilateral relationship and commitment to a free, open, and prosperous Indo-Pacific region. Read the joint statement. https://t.co/bZf7fBAanc https://t.co/AVmE2qviho

In recognition of #PeaceOfficersMemorialDay, @StateDeptDSS joined law enforcement agencies in honoring the brave men and women who lost their lives in the line of duty. #PoliceWeek2019 https://t.co/GlIpvjKOSQ
Today, @SecPompeo welcomed #Singapore's Foreign Minister @VivianBala to the Department of State. @MFAsg @RedWhiteBlueDot https://t.co/mvWMgMQl8A

It's #NationalPoliceWeek. Did you know that @StateINL partners with 24 of the most highly-regarded police organizations in the United States to help their foreign counterparts fight crime more effectively. Learn more? https://t.co/wuDp084VEm

The United States has not adequately invested in our #Caribbean partnerships for decades. The @realDonaldTrump administration is changing that. Read how our renewed focus on our Caribbean neighbors will pay dividends for the Caribbean and the U.S. https://t.co/UzC6rBPwKW

.@WHAAsstSecty Breier: The United States, under the @realDonaldTrump Administration, is engaging more in the #Caribbean. We are joining with the rest of the hemisphere to take more action to create an engine for economic vitality, innovation, and growth. https://t.co/JBJuwfCYCs

.@WHAAsstSecty Breier: We must work together to manage the destabilizing crisis of #Venezuela and the thousands of Venezuelan migrants who have sought refuge in your countries…We cannot remain silent on the political, economic, and humanitarian crisis in Venezuela. https://t.co/A2FbvKU1uY

.@WHAAsstSecty Breier: The @realDonaldTrump Administration has put a new focus on closer ties with the #Caribbean due to our shared interests and the crisis in #Venezuela, which require greater cooperation, not less. https://t.co/UV8IDCJkpF
This morning, @SecPompeo welcomed #SriLanka's Foreign Minister Tilak Marapana to the Department of State. @mfa_srilanka @USEmbSL @EmbassyofSL https://t.co/VvL9Y2vZCZ

“President Trump’s recognition of Israeli sovereignty over the Golan Heights was met with condemnation... Yet President Trump’s Golan proclamation is entirely consistent with #UNSC Resolution 242.” -- @SecPompeo and @USAmbIsrael in @WSJ https://t.co/CdRCcirGt7

Under Secretary for Political Affairs Hale met with Prime Ministers Wever-Croes of #Aruba and Rhuggenaath of #Curaçao and reaffirmed our strong relationships, including our partnership to advance democracy and stability in the region amid the crisis in #Venezuela. https://t.co/AykbEaWnbG
Today, @SecPompeo met with #Russia’s Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov in Sochi. https://t.co/5vcJMkq7oC
Earlier today, @SecPompeo arrived in Sochi, #Russia, to meet with Russian Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov and President Vladimir Putin. https://t.co/Uz3LTAn4og
.@SecPompeo highlighted American exceptionalism during his remarks at the @ClaremontInst’s 40th Anniversary Gala. https://t.co/NHjD4wC6dR https://t.co/R5Fn1tqv7L
Earlier today, @SecPompeo met with EU High Representative @FedericaMog in Brussels. https://t.co/fK63DVaoSr
On May 11, @SecPompeo commented on the privilege of serving as America’s most senior diplomat, at the @ClaremontInst’s 40th Anniversary Gala. https://t.co/NHjD4wC6dR https://t.co/WzSKUHVy06
Today, @SecPompeo delivered keynote remarks at the @ClaremontInst’s 40th Anniversary Gala. Watch full remarks here: https://t.co/ltYvPFMjtk
Tonight, @SecPompeo delivers keynote remarks at the @ClaremontInst’s 40th Anniversary Gala. Watch live on https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz at 8:00 PM PDT/ 11:00 PM EDT. https://t.co/3xmR6E56pZ

This week, @SecPompeo traveled to Finland, Iraq, and UK; the State Department hosted the 1st annual U.S.-Kenya Bilateral Strategic Dialogue; and Special Rep. Hook gave remarks on the 1st anniversary of President @realDonaldTrump's new #Iran strategy. https://t.co/WDizE338GQ https://t.co/K7OXMo3RGM

.@SecPompeo will deliver keynote remarks at the @ClaremontInst’s 40th Anniversary Gala in Beverly Hills, California, on May 11 at 8:00 p.m. PDT / 11:00 p.m. EDT. Watch live at https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz. https://t.co/PQdA4KOTlp

Today, the United States launched the Global Health Security Strategy, which reinforces the accomplishments of the Global Health Security Agenda to prevent, detect, and respond to infectious disease threats.  #HealthSecurity #GHSAgenda https://t.co/P4XuvIwoe2

.@SecPompeo: The United States will continue to apply maximum pressure on the Iranian regime until its leaders change their destructive behavior, respect the rights of the Iranian people, and return to the negotiating table. https://t.co/CXCaa3BYeN

The U.S. and #Kenya held the inaugural Bilateral Strategic Dialogue on May 7-8. As democracies committed to a rules-based order, the Strategic Partnership is grounded in shared values, mutual cooperation & a common vision for free, open & secure societies. https://t.co/Hg2rveYhTu

Special Rep. Hook at @CSIS: If the clerics in Tehran choose, as the Iranian people are demanding, to play by the rules, respect the sovereignty of their neighbors, and abide by international obligations and commitments, the United States will be ready and willing to engage. #Iran https://t.co/sZXopr9xw3

Special Rep. Hook at @CSIS: Leaving the deal has allowed us to fully re-impose our pressure & restore several basic demands on #Iran...We are working w/our allies to see that these basic demands are met. The U.S. is not alone in our demand that Iran behave like a normal country. https://t.co/1S1lZr7mVb

Special Representative Hook at @CSIS: Too many nations have become resigned to #Iran’s destabilizing role in these and others conflicts – and too few have been willing to challenge it. The nuclear deal fed this dangerous cycle. Low expectations begot bolder Iranian expansionism. https://t.co/npsKpd8Xcq

Special Representative for #Iran Brian Hook at @CSIS: By nearly every measure, the regime is weaker today than when we took office two years ago. Its proxies are underfunded and demoralized. Unless the regime demonstrates a change in behavior, the pressure on Tehran will mount. https://t.co/KooOQyAd7t

Today, Special Representative for #Iran Brian Hook will give remarks on "Iran One Year Later: The Trump Administration’s Policy, Looking Back and Looking Forward," at @CSIS at 1:30 p.m. ET. Watch live at https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz. @CSISMidEast

.@SecPompeo: As Secretary of State, I tell the people of the UK, that America will remain a friend to you, and a friend of justice, freedom, and truth. Let our two nations go forward in that same spirit. Let’s recognize how special this #SpecialRelationship really is. https://t.co/X12UxcwORA

.@SecPompeo: You are our partner in promoting free enterprise. The world can look at our prosperous trade relationship and see the fruits of democratic capitalism. Let’s keep the West the wellspring of innovation. #SpecialRelationship https://t.co/JOLWFRA7Qp

.@SecPompeo: Insufficient security will impede the United States’ ability to share certain information within trusted networks. This is just what China wants...We know 5G is a sovereign decision but it must be made with the broader strategic context in mind. #SpecialRelationship https://t.co/ae1w5ReU1R

.@SecPompeo: Our nations are united by a common history & cultural heritage. We share common values: respect for rule of law, protection of basic freedoms, an unwavering belief in human dignity. These pillars of our societies form the basis of our success. #SpecialRelationship https://t.co/N8B6QOUKWD
Today, @SecPompeo will deliver remarks in London, United Kingdom, at 11:00 a.m. ET. Watch live at https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz. #SpecialRelationship @USAmbUK @USAinUK

.@SecPompeo: The United States welcomes the news that Asia Bibi has safely reunited with her family. The U.S. uniformly opposes blasphemy laws anywhere in the world, as they jeopardize the exercise of fundamental freedoms. https://t.co/QQ5SQdI0cI

Today, Deputy Secretary John Sullivan met with #Kenya's Cabinet Secretary for Foreign Affairs and International Trade Ambassador Monica Juma and jointly signed the Strategic Dialogue Framework Agreement. @diplomacy_kenya @AsstSecStateAF @USEmbassyKenya https://t.co/cfvkEITjus
Today, @SecPompeo met with #Canada's Foreign Minister @cafreeland on the margins of the @ArcticCouncil Ministerial in Rovaniemi, Finland. @CanadaFP @USEmbassyOttawa https://t.co/6GVhdCuthq

Today, @VP Mike Pence will deliver remarks at the 49th Annual Washington Conference on the Americas, co-hosted by the U.S. Department of State and @ASCOA, at 3:25 p.m. ET. Watch live here on Twitter or https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz. #2019WCA https://t.co/YTMFqOEsJb
Today, @SecPompeo met with #Denmark's Foreign Minister @anderssamuelsen on the margins of the @ArcticCouncil Ministerial in Rovaniemi, Finland. @DanishMFA @usembdenmark https://t.co/4r0O6t1oTF
Today, @SecPompeo participated in the @ArcticCouncil Ministers Family Photo in Rovaniemi, Finland. https://t.co/zEG5Udapoh
.@SecPompeo is greeted by #Finland's Foreign Minister Timo Soini upon his arrival at the @ArcticCouncil Ministers' Working Dinner in Rovaniemi. @Ulkoministerio @usembfinland https://t.co/oyQWwuohTH
Today, @SecPompeo met with #Russia's Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov on the margins of the @ArcticCouncil Ministerial in Rovaniemi, Finland. https://t.co/rpZIn4Xgbh

.@SecPompeo: Today America is sharpening its focus on the Arctic and securing its future. Under President @realDonaldTrump, we are fortifying America’s security and diplomatic presence here. https://t.co/TJmIMrH90e

.@SecPompeo: As a fellow @ArcticCouncil member, #Russia & the other Arctic states have fruitfully cooperated in a number of areas, including on expansive conservation efforts. We want this cooperation to continue. But we can’t have one side cooperate, and the other side derogate. https://t.co/syYz57Q1tV

.@SecPompeo: To leverage Arctic’s potential, all nations—incl. non-Arctic states—should have a right to engage peacefully in the region. But all parties in marketplace have to play by the rules. Those who violate rule of law should lose their right to participate in marketplace. https://t.co/ypqLQ4FPUc

.@SecPompeo: The United States is an Arctic nation...This is our time to appreciate it like never before. This is America’s moment to stand up as an Arctic nation, for the Arctic’s future...the Arctic is a frontier of opportunity and abundance. https://t.co/Veg3PenwA1

.@SecPompeo leads the U.S. delegation to 11th @ArcticCouncil Ministerial on May 6-7, in Rovaniemi, Finland. The U.S. will join the seven other Arctic States at this biennial gathering to strengthen cooperation & ensure the region remains free of conflict. https://t.co/EEeORx6F1N
Live now: @SecPompeo gives remarks on “Looking North: Sharpening America’s Arctic Focus,” in Rovaniemi, Finland. https://t.co/1eRI6Z5mSG

Coming up at approximately 9:00 a.m. EDT (4:00 p.m. LOCAL), @SecPompeo gives remarks on “Looking North: Sharpening America’s Arctic Focus,” in Rovaniemi, Finland. Watch live here or at https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz.
Statement by @statedeptspox on rocket attacks on Israel. https://t.co/zDSvZMoh2o

The U.S. will continue to apply maximum pressure until #Iran’s leaders change their destructive behavior, respect the rights of their people, and return to the negotiating table. Read more. https://t.co/hvw3ifanA0

This week at State, @SecPompeo participated in The Hill’s Newsmaker Series with @BobCusack and affirmed U.S. support for the people of #Venezuela, @StateSEHI marked #YomHashoah. Read more: https://t.co/m1mused1gb https://t.co/mHAjh60YzC

.@SecPompeo at @AFSATweets ceremony: I’m humbled to join you in
honoring those who answered the high calling of American diplomacy to
the fullest. Their lives were not lost in vain. We will continue to safeguard
and advance the precious freedoms for which they died. https://t.co/SjieNIpjqK

.@SecPompeo at @AFSATweets ceremony: Protecting our team in the field is among my highest priorities. We ask every member of our team to assume great risks on behalf of the United States, and they and their families deserve the best security we can muster. https://t.co/aHRUdukh7p
Live now! @SecPompeo delivers remarks at the American Foreign Service Association (@AFSATweets) Memorial Plaque Ceremony. https://t.co/2UMjyK3z3z
.@SecPompeo comments on reaffirming the value of family members, opening up communication, and getting the team back on the field, on #ForeignServiceDay. https://t.co/VdXyXRivUL

Today, @SecPompeo will deliver remarks at the Department of State’s #ForeignAffairsDay Celebration and attend the American Foreign Service Association (@AFSATweets) Memorial Plaque Ceremony at 3:45 p.m. ET. Watch live here on Twitter or https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz.

.@SecPompeo: On #WPFD2019, we reaffirm our commitment to protecting safety and freedom for members of the press. A free and independent media is indispensable to a vibrant, functioning democracy. https://t.co/S0aKU2yMp3

Under Secretary Hale discussed shared challenges & opportunities with State Counsellor Aung San Suu Kyi, and Ministers Kyaw Tin & Lt Gen Sein Win. #Burma must take concrete steps to resolve the #Rakhine crisis. We support peace, prosperity & democratic freedoms for all in Burma. https://t.co/1TEh8b0Kww

Visiting Aung Mingalar, a #Rohingya ward in #Rakhine State, Under Secretary Hale heard first-hand about the challenges and aspirations of the community. Addressing the root causes of the Rakhine crisis in #Burma is critical to achieving a resolution. https://t.co/raTHmjDmpp
On April 29, Special Envoy to Combat Global Anti-Semitism, Elan Carr, spoke on behalf of the administration at the funeral of Poway Synagogue shooting victim, Lori Kaye. https://t.co/yEBIYZroSN
.@StateSEHI Thomas Yazdgerdi discusses the Trump administration’s commitment support of the State Department’s Office of the Special Envoy on Holocaust Issues. https://t.co/dpPMaw5g4T
.@StateSEHI Thomas Yazdgerdi comments on Holocaust issues. https://t.co/dLYGLJGyjM
.@StateSEHI Thomas Yazdgerdi comments on promoting Holocaust education. https://t.co/mZJI8YZXYq

Under Secretary Hale heard from civic leaders about their decades-long work fight for greater peace and freedom in #Burma, and toured @USEmbassyBurma’s new #AmericanCenter – a hub of activity for generations of Myanmar’s leaders. https://t.co/rBI1lEU2em

To understand any country, start with its history. Under Secretary Hale and @USEmbassyBurma Ambassador Marciel visited the house of former #UN Secretary General U Thant and discussed #Myanmar’s role in the region with his grandson Thant Myint-U, one of Burma’s leading historians. https://t.co/6NIxEf59We
The United States will not waver in its support for freedom in #Venezuela. Read more. https://t.co/uz5R0AD49w #EstamosUnidosVE

In his remarks at @BENS_org tonight, @SecPompeo highlighted the situation in Venezuela and how China presents itself as a threat. Read the Secretary's full remarks: https://t.co/TtZBPOGKS8 https://t.co/w8hjl86YGy

“As we work to figure out how to deal with #China, a country that presents enormous risk, we must think about how we can achieve our national security objectives while ensuring that America continues to grow and prosper.” - @SecPompeo to @BENS_org https://t.co/1zCFQqFz0K

“The idea of a private sector entity is literally foreign to China … and that has real implications for how we, as the leaders tasked with defending America today, interact with them.” — @SecPompeo at @BENS_org https://t.co/LO0K6etMle

.@SecPompeo on #Venezuela at @BENS_org: “The opportunity for Venezuelan democracy will remain ... our team will continue to focus on protecting the Venezuelan people, restoring their dignity, growing their economy, and creating democracy in the Western Hemisphere.” https://t.co/HDwOKgEshP
Live now: @SecPompeo speaks at the @BENS_org Gala and Award Ceremony. https://t.co/uyTFVSCj77
Coming up at approximately 9pm EDT: @SecPompeo delivers remarks at the @BENS_org Gala and Award Ceremony. Watch live here or at https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz. https://t.co/2TVnasxQ1X

.@SecPompeo to @BretBaier: "The Venezuelan people should know that not just the United States, but 50-plus countries, the Organization of American States are all prepared to continue to work and support them and stand with them." 
Read the full interview: https://t.co/oyoQw4kNMD
